channel.title: Teaching on Donggyu Kim
channel.description: Recent content in Teaching on Donggyu Kim

item.title: 25 Summer Algebra
item.description:
GT Summer Edge Program: Algebra (2025)

Instructor: Donggyu Kim
E-mail: donggyu@gatech.edu
Office hours: MTR 1:00-2:00 pm, Skiles 237b

TA: Owen Huang
E-mail: ohuang9@gatech.edu
Office hours: W 1:00-2:00 pm, Skiles 114

Meeting time: MTWR 9:05-9:55 am
Meeting location: Skiles 114

Announcements

  • Our primary text will be Judson's Abstract Algebra: Theory and Applications. You are encouraged to familiarize yourself with chapters 1 and 2 before we get started, and should complete the exercises listed below before our first day.
  • You should attempt all listed exercises and submit solutions to those with stars. You are encouraged to submit homework in LaTeX. If you are unfamiliar with LaTeX, you can first try using Overleaf; see this brief introduction. You may use this homework format.
  • More on LaTeX & Overleaf: How to insert images?
  • Midterm Exam: 9:05-10:35 am, June 26th, Thursday, at Skiles 114. Closed book. Exam scope: through group actions.
  • June 21st: I will be out of town in Week 5, and TA Owen will give lectures instead of me. I have sent you the Zoom links for office hours, so please check your email.
  • July 8th: Today's office hour will be at Skiles 114, the classroom.
  • Final Exam: 1:05-3:05 pm, July 17th, Thursday, at Skiles 114. Closed book. Exam scope: all, but mostly focused on topics learnt after midterm.

Schedule

The following is a tentative, nonbinding schedule. It will be updated as the summer progresses.
